items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires a deterministic outcome for the scenario of 'Graceful degradation when agent confused'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or validations related to this scenario, nor does it demonstrate how the system behaves under confusion. Without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and outcome, it is impossible to assess whether the requirement is met.
